meanings.definition: consider in detail and subject to an analysis in order to discover essential features or meaning
examples: analyze the evidence in a criminal trial

meanings.definition: be a student; follow a course of study; be enrolled at an institute of learning
be a student of a certain subject
examples: She is reading for the bar exam
He is studying geology in his room
I have an exam next week; I must hit the books now

meanings.definition: think intently and at length, as for spiritual purposes
examples: He is meditating in his study

meanings.definition: produced or marked by conscious design or premeditation; ; - V.L.Parrington
examples: a note of biting irony and studied insult
